elements.text: You have enrolled in a programming class because you think it will be a useful skill to acquire going forward. You know the demand for people with programming skills is increasing, but the course is very difficult. Imagining how you will do in the class, you believe your efforts to learn some programming skills will be...

elements.name: the_difficult_course--academics_work_career_development--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
